description: Salesforce Order/Account to SAP Sales Order via RFC or OData. Production-validated.
criticalRules: SAP material numbers must be left-padded to 18 characters with leading zeros: '100' becomes '000000000000000100'
SAP customer numbers (KUNNR) left-padded to 10 characters
SAP dates are YYYYMMDD format (no hyphens, no slashes)
SAP amounts use period as decimal separator regardless of locale
SAP currency codes are 3-char ISO (USD, EUR) - same as Salesforce CurrencyIsoCode
SAP sales org, distribution channel, division must all be populated - cannot be null
SAP BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 requires VBELN (order number) as output, not input
Empty strings in SAP BAPI calls cause RFC_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE - use null not empty string for optional fields

keyMappings.ORDER_ITEMS_IN[].TARGET_QTY: Quantity as string with 3 decimal places: '5.000'

dateConversion: fun toSAPDate(d) = if (d != null and d != '') (d as Date {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'}) as String {format: 'yyyyMMdd'} else null

paddingFunctions.materialNumber: fun padMaterial(m) = if (m != null) ('000000000000000000' ++ m)[-18 to -1] else null
paddingFunctions.customerNumber: fun padCustomer(c) = if (c != null) ('0000000000' ++ c)[-10 to -1] else null

sapInterface: BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 via SAP Connector or OData /API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
commonFailures: Material not found: number not zero-padded to 18 chars
Customer not found: KUNNR not zero-padded to 10 chars
RFC_ERROR: empty string passed for optional field - use null
Date format error: YYYYMMDD expected, ISO 8601 passed
Missing org data: sales org/dist channel/division not in payload - must come from config
